verses.latin_vulgate: Accesserunt autem filiæ Salphaad, filii Hepher, filii Galaad, filii Machir, filii Manasse, qui fuit filius Joseph : quarum sunt nomina, Maala, et Noa, et Hegla, et Melcha, et Thersa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּקְרַ֜בְנָה בְּנ֣וֹת צְלׇפְחָ֗ד בֶּן־חֵ֤פֶר בֶּן־גִּלְעָד֙ בֶּן־מָכִ֣יר בֶּן־מְנַשֶּׁ֔ה לְמִשְׁפְּחֹ֖ת מְנַשֶּׁ֣ה בֶן־יוֹסֵ֑ף וְאֵ֙לֶּה֙ שְׁמ֣וֹת בְּנֹתָ֔יו מַחְלָ֣ה נֹעָ֔ה וְחׇגְלָ֥ה וּמִלְכָּ֖ה וְתִרְצָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then came the daughters of Salphaad, the son of Hepher, the son of Galaad, the son of Machir, the son of Manasses, who was the son of Joseph: and their names are Maala, and Noa, and Hegla, and Melcha, and Thersa.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin tulivat edes Zelophkadin tyttäret, Hephrin pojan, Gileadin pojan, Makirin pojan, Manassen pojan, Manassen Josephin pojan suvusta, ja nämät olivat hänen tytärtensä nimet: Makla, Noa, Hogla, Milka ja Tirtsa.
verses.king_james: Then came the daughters of Zelophehad, the son of Hepher, the son of Gilead, the son of Machir, the son of Manasseh, of the families of Manasseh the son of Joseph: and these are the names of his daughters; Mahlah, Noah, and Hoglah, and Milcah, and Tirzah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Steteruntque coram Moyse et Eleazaro sacerdote et cunctis principibus populi ad ostium tabernaculi fœderis, atque dixerunt :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽתַּעֲמֹ֜דְנָה לִפְנֵ֣י מֹשֶׁ֗ה וְלִפְנֵי֙ אֶלְעָזָ֣ר הַכֹּהֵ֔ן וְלִפְנֵ֥י הַנְּשִׂיאִ֖ם וְכׇל־הָעֵדָ֑ה פֶּ֥תַח אֹֽהֶל־מוֹעֵ֖ד לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And they stood before Moses and Eleazar the priest, and all the princes of the people at the door of the tabernacle of the covenant, and said:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he astuivat Moseksen ja papin Eleatsarin, ja päämiesten, ja kaiken kansan eteen, seurakunnan majan ovelle, ja sanoivat:
verses.king_james: And they stood before Moses, and before Eleazar the priest, and before the princes and all the congregation, by the door of the tabernacle of the congregation, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Pater noster mortuus est in deserto, nec fuit in seditione, quæ concitata est contra Dominum sub Core, sed in peccato suo mortuus est : hic non habuit mares filios. Cur tollitur nomen illius de familia sua, quia non habuit filium ? date nobis possessionem inter cognatos patris nostri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָבִ֘ינוּ֮ מֵ֣ת בַּמִּדְבָּר֒ וְה֨וּא לֹא־הָיָ֜ה בְּת֣וֹךְ הָעֵדָ֗ה הַנּוֹעָדִ֛ים עַל־יְהֹוָ֖ה בַּעֲדַת־קֹ֑רַח כִּֽי־בְחֶטְא֣וֹ מֵ֔ת וּבָנִ֖ים לֹא־הָ֥יוּ לֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Our father died in the desert, and was not in the sedition, that was raised against the Lord under Core, but he died in his own sin: and he had no male children. Why is his name taken away out of his family, because he had no son? Give us a possession among the kinsmen of our father.
verses.finnish_biblia: Meidän isämme kuoli korvessa, eikä hän ollut siinä joukossa, jotka metelin nostivat Herraa vastaan Koran kapinassa, mutta on synnissänsä kuollut: ja ei ollut hänellä poikia.
verses.king_james: Our father died in the wilderness, and he was not in the company of them that gathered themselves together against the Lord in the company of Korah; but died in his own sin, and had no sons.

verses.latin_vulgate: Retulitque Moyses causam earum ad judicium Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָ֣מָּה יִגָּרַ֤ע שֵׁם־אָבִ֙ינוּ֙ מִתּ֣וֹךְ מִשְׁפַּחְתּ֔וֹ כִּ֛י אֵ֥ין ל֖וֹ בֵּ֑ן תְּנָה־לָּ֣נוּ אֲחֻזָּ֔ה בְּת֖וֹךְ אֲחֵ֥י אָבִֽינוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Moses referred their cause to the judgment of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Miksi meidän isämme nimen pitää tuleman suvustansa pois, sentähden ettei hänellä ollut yhtään poikaa? antakaat meille osa isämme veljein seassa.
verses.king_james: Why should the name of our father be done away from among his family, because he hath no son? Give unto us therefore a possession among the brethren of our father.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui dixit ad eum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּקְרֵ֥ב מֹשֶׁ֛ה אֶת־מִשְׁפָּטָ֖ן לִפְנֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to him:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses tuotti heidän asiansa Herran eteen.
verses.king_james: And Moses brought their cause before the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Justam rem postulant filiæ Salphaad : da eis possessionem inter cognatos patris sui, et ei in hæreditatem succedant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֥אמֶר יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֥ה לֵּאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: The daughters of Salphaad demand a just thing: Give them a possession among their father's kindred, and let them succeed him in his inheritance.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra puhui Mosekselle, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Ad filios autem Israël loqueris hæc :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֵּ֗ן בְּנ֣וֹת צְלׇפְחָד֮ דֹּבְרֹת֒ נָתֹ֨ן תִּתֵּ֤ן לָהֶם֙ אֲחֻזַּ֣ת נַחֲלָ֔ה בְּת֖וֹךְ אֲחֵ֣י אֲבִיהֶ֑ם וְהַֽעֲבַרְתָּ֛ אֶת־נַחֲלַ֥ת אֲבִיהֶ֖ן לָהֶֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: And to the children of Israel thou shalt speak these things:
verses.finnish_biblia: Zelophkadin tyttäret ovat oikein puhuneet: sinun pitää kaiketi antaman perintöosan heille heidän isänsä veljein seassa, ja saattaman heidän isänsä perimisen heille.
verses.king_james: The daughters of Zelophehad speak right: thou shalt surely give them a possession of an inheritance among their father’s brethren; and thou shalt cause the inheritance of their father to pass unto them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Homo cum mortuus fuerit absque filio, ad filiam ejus transibit hæreditas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶל־בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל תְּדַבֵּ֣ר לֵאמֹ֑ר אִ֣ישׁ כִּֽי־יָמ֗וּת וּבֵן֙ אֵ֣ין ל֔וֹ וְהַֽעֲבַרְתֶּ֥ם אֶת־נַחֲלָת֖וֹ לְבִתּֽוֹ׃
verses.douay_rheims: When a man dieth without a son, his inheritance shall pass to his daughter.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja puhu Israelin lapsille, sanoen: jos joku kuolee ilman pojata, niin teidän pitää antaman hänen perimisensä hänen tyttärellensä.
verses.king_james: And thou shalt speak unto the children of Israel, saying, If a man die, and have no son, then ye shall cause his inheritance to pass unto his daughter.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si filiam non habuerit, habebit successores fratres suos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־אֵ֥ין ל֖וֹ בַּ֑ת וּנְתַתֶּ֥ם אֶת־נַחֲלָת֖וֹ לְאֶחָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: If he have no daughter, his brethren shall succeed him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jollei hänellä ole tytärtä, niin teidän pitää sen perimisen hänen veljillensä antaman.
verses.king_james: And if he have no daughter, then ye shall give his inheritance unto his brethren.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quod si et fratres non fuerint, dabitis hæreditatem fratribus patris ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־אֵ֥ין ל֖וֹ אַחִ֑ים וּנְתַתֶּ֥ם אֶת־נַחֲלָת֖וֹ לַאֲחֵ֥י אָבִֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And if he have no brethren, you shall give the inheritance to his father's brethren.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja jollei hänellä ole veljiä; niin teidän pitää sen antaman hänen sedillensä.
verses.king_james: And if he have no brethren, then ye shall give his inheritance unto his father’s brethren.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sin autem nec patruos habuerit, dabitur hæreditas his qui ei proximi sunt. Eritque hoc filiis Israël sanctum lege perpetua, sicut præcepit Dominus Moysi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־אֵ֣ין אַחִים֮ לְאָבִיו֒ וּנְתַתֶּ֣ם אֶת־נַחֲלָת֗וֹ לִשְׁאֵר֞וֹ הַקָּרֹ֥ב אֵלָ֛יו מִמִּשְׁפַּחְתּ֖וֹ וְיָרַ֣שׁ אֹתָ֑הּ וְֽהָ֨יְתָ֜ה לִבְנֵ֤י יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ לְחֻקַּ֣ת מִשְׁפָּ֔ט כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֶת־מֹשֶֽׁה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: But if he have no uncles by the father, the inheritance shall be given to them that are the next akin. And this shall be to the children of Israel sacred by a perpetual law, as the Lord hath commanded Moses.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jollei hänellä ole setiä, niin teidän pitää sen antaman hänen lähimmäiselle sukulaisellensa, joka hänen lähimmäinen lankonsa on hänen suvustansa, että hän sen omistaa. Tämä pitää oleman Israelin lapsille sääty ja oikeus, niinkuin Herra on Mosekselle käskenyt.
verses.king_james: And if his father have no brethren, then ye shall give his inheritance unto his kinsman that is next to him of his family, and he shall possess it: and it shall be unto the children of Israel a statute of judgment, as the Lord commanded Moses.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit quoque Dominus ad Moysen : Ascende in montem istum Abarim, et contemplare inde terram, quam daturus sum filiis Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֤אמֶר יְהֹוָה֙ אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֔ה עֲלֵ֛ה אֶל־הַ֥ר הָעֲבָרִ֖ים הַזֶּ֑ה וּרְאֵה֙ אֶת־הָאָ֔רֶץ אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָתַ֖תִּי לִבְנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord also said to Moses: Go up into this mountain Abarim, and view from thence the land which I will give to the children of Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi Mosekselle: astu ylös tälle Abarimin vuorelle, ja katsele sitä maata, jonka minä Israelin lapsille annan.
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto Moses, Get thee up into this mount Abarim, and see the land which I have given unto the children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque videris eam, ibis et tu ad populum tuum, sicut ivit frater tuus Aaron :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְרָאִ֣יתָה אֹתָ֔הּ וְנֶאֱסַפְתָּ֥ אֶל־עַמֶּ֖יךָ גַּם־אָ֑תָּה כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר נֶאֱסַ֖ף אַהֲרֹ֥ן אָחִֽיךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And when thou shalt have seen it, thou also shalt go to thy people, as thy brother Aaron is gone:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kuin sen nähnyt olet, niin sinäkin kootaan kansas tykö, niinkuin sinun veljes Aaron koottu on.
verses.king_james: And when thou hast seen it, thou also shalt be gathered unto thy people, as Aaron thy brother was gathered.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia offendistis me in deserto Sin in contradictione multitudinis, nec sanctificare me voluistis coram ea super aquas. Hæ sunt aquæ contradictionis in Cades deserti Sin.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּאֲשֶׁר֩ מְרִיתֶ֨ם פִּ֜י בְּמִדְבַּר־צִ֗ן בִּמְרִיבַת֙ הָֽעֵדָ֔ה לְהַקְדִּישֵׁ֥נִי בַמַּ֖יִם לְעֵינֵיהֶ֑ם הֵ֛ם מֵֽי־מְרִיבַ֥ת קָדֵ֖שׁ מִדְבַּר־צִֽן׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Because you offended me in the desert of Sin in the contradiction of the multitude, neither would you sanctify me before them at the waters. These are the waters of contradiction in Cades of the desert of Sin.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä te olitte minun sanalleni kovakorvaiset Sinin korvessa kansan toruessa, kuin teidän piti minua pyhittämän veden kautta heidän edessänsä. Se on se riitavesi Kadeksessa, Sinin korvessa.
verses.king_james: For ye rebelled against my commandment in the desert of Zin, in the strife of the congregation, to sanctify me at the water before their eyes: that is the water of Meribah in Kadesh in the wilderness of Zin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cui respondit Moyses :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֣ר מֹשֶׁ֔ה אֶל־יְהֹוָ֖ה לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And Moses answered him:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses puhui Herralle, sanoen:
verses.king_james: And Moses spake unto the Lord, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Provideat Dominus Deus spirituum omnis carnis hominem, qui sit super multitudinem hanc :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִפְקֹ֣ד יְהֹוָ֔ה אֱלֹהֵ֥י הָרוּחֹ֖ת לְכׇל־בָּשָׂ֑ר אִ֖ישׁ עַל־הָעֵדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: May the Lord the God of the spirits of all flesh provide a man, that may be over this multitude:
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, kaiken lihan henkein Jumala asettakaan miehen kansan päälle,
verses.king_james: Let the Lord, the God of the spirits of all flesh, set a man over the congregation,

verses.latin_vulgate: et possit exire et intrare ante eos, et educere eos vel introducere : ne sit populus Domini sicut oves absque pastore.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁר־יֵצֵ֣א לִפְנֵיהֶ֗ם וַאֲשֶׁ֤ר יָבֹא֙ לִפְנֵיהֶ֔ם וַאֲשֶׁ֥ר יוֹצִיאֵ֖ם וַאֲשֶׁ֣ר יְבִיאֵ֑ם וְלֹ֤א תִהְיֶה֙ עֲדַ֣ת יְהֹוָ֔ה כַּצֹּ֕אן אֲשֶׁ֥ר אֵין־לָהֶ֖ם רֹעֶֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And may go out and in before them, and may lead them out, or bring them in: lest the people of the Lord be as sheep without a shepherd.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joka heidän edessänsä kävis ulos ja sisälle, ja veis heitä ulos ja sisälle, ettei Herran kansa olisi niinkuin lampaat ilman paimenta.
verses.king_james: Which may go out before them, and which may go in before them, and which may lead them out, and which may bring them in; that the congregation of the Lord be not as sheep which have no shepherd.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixitque Dominus ad eum : Tolle Josue filium Nun, virum in quo est spiritus, et pone manum tuam super eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֹּ֨אמֶר יְהֹוָ֜ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֗ה קַח־לְךָ֙ אֶת־יְהוֹשֻׁ֣עַ בִּן־נ֔וּן אִ֖ישׁ אֲשֶׁר־ר֣וּחַ בּ֑וֹ וְסָמַכְתָּ֥ אֶת־יָדְךָ֖ עָלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: And the Lord said to him: take Josue the son of Nun, a man in whom is the Spirit, and put thy hand upon him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Herra sanoi Mosekselle: ota Josua Nunin poika sinun tykös, joka on mies, jossa henki on, ja pane sinun kätes hänen päällensä,
verses.king_james: And the Lord said unto Moses, Take thee Joshua the son of Nun, a man in whom is the spirit, and lay thine hand upon him;

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui stabit coram Eleazaro sacerdote et omni multitudine :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהַֽעֲמַדְתָּ֣ אֹת֗וֹ לִפְנֵי֙ אֶלְעָזָ֣ר הַכֹּהֵ֔ן וְלִפְנֵ֖י כׇּל־הָעֵדָ֑ה וְצִוִּיתָ֥ה אֹת֖וֹ לְעֵינֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And he shall stand before Eleazar the priest and all the multitude:
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja aseta hänet papin Eleatsarin ja kaiken kansan eteen, ja käske hänelle heidän silmäinsä edessä.
verses.king_james: And set him before Eleazar the priest, and before all the congregation; and give him a charge in their sight.

verses.latin_vulgate: et dabis ei præcepta cunctis videntibus, et partem gloriæ tuæ, ut audiat eum omnis synagoga filiorum Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנָתַתָּ֥ה מֵהֽוֹדְךָ֖ עָלָ֑יו לְמַ֣עַן יִשְׁמְע֔וּ כׇּל־עֲדַ֖ת בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: And thou shalt give him precepts in the sight of all, and part of thy glory, that all the congregation of the children of Israel may hear him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja pane sinun kunniastas hänen päällensä, että kaikki kansa Israelin lapsista olisivat hänelle kuuliaiset.
verses.king_james: And thou shalt put some of thine honour upon him, that all the congregation of the children of Israel may be obedient.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pro hoc, si quid agendum erit, Eleazar sacerdos consulet Dominum. Ad verbum ejus egredietur et ingredietur ipse, et omnes filii Israël cum eo, et cetera multitudo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלִפְנֵ֨י אֶלְעָזָ֤ר הַכֹּהֵן֙ יַעֲמֹ֔ד וְשָׁ֥אַל ל֛וֹ בְּמִשְׁפַּ֥ט הָאוּרִ֖ים לִפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה עַל־פִּ֨יו יֵצְא֜וּ וְעַל־פִּ֣יו יָבֹ֗אוּ ה֛וּא וְכׇל־בְּנֵי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֥ל אִתּ֖וֹ וְכׇל־הָעֵדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: If any thing be to be done, Eleazar the priest shall consult the Lord for him. He and all the children of Israel with him, and the rest of the multitude shall go out and go in at his word.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja hänen pitää papin Eleatsarin eteen astuman, hänen pitää kysymän neuvoa hänen edestänsä valkeuden säädyllä Herran edessä, ja hänen suunsa jälkeen pitää hänen käymän ulos ja sisälle, sekä hänen että Israelin lasten hänen kanssansa, ja koko seurakunnan.
verses.king_james: And he shall stand before Eleazar the priest, who shall ask counsel for him after the judgment of Urim before the Lord: at his word shall they go out, and at his word they shall come in, both he, and all the children of Israel with him, even all the congregation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fecit Moyses ut præceperat Dominus : cumque tulisset Josue, statuit eum coram Eleazaro sacerdote et omni frequentia populi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֣עַשׂ מֹשֶׁ֔ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר צִוָּ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה אֹת֑וֹ וַיִּקַּ֣ח אֶת־יְהוֹשֻׁ֗עַ וַיַּֽעֲמִדֵ֙הוּ֙ לִפְנֵי֙ אֶלְעָזָ֣ר הַכֹּהֵ֔ן וְלִפְנֵ֖י כׇּל־הָעֵדָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Moses did as the Lord had commanded. And, when he had taken Josue, he set him before Eleazar the priest, and all the assembly of the people,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Moses teki niinkuin Herra hänelle käski, ja otti Josuan ja asetti hänen papin Eleatsarin ja koko seurakunnan eteen,
verses.king_james: And Moses did as the Lord commanded him: and he took Joshua, and set him before Eleazar the priest, and before all the congregation:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et impositis capiti ejus manibus, cuncta replicavit quæ mandaverat Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְמֹ֧ךְ אֶת־יָדָ֛יו עָלָ֖יו וַיְצַוֵּ֑הוּ כַּאֲשֶׁ֛ר דִּבֶּ֥ר יְהֹוָ֖ה בְּיַד־מֹשֶֽׁה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And laying his hands on his head, he repeated all things that the Lord had commanded.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja laski kätensä hänen päällensä, ja käski hänelle, niinkuin Herra oli Mosekselle puhunut.
verses.king_james: And he laid his hands upon him, and gave him a charge, as the Lord commanded by the hand of Moses.
